docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.T.I. UNITED STATES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT MAY NOT RELY UPON A DECLARATION TO DECIDE A DEMURRER. C.C.P. SECTION 430.10(C) REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES BE ALIGNED IN BOTH CASES AND THE PARTIES ARE THE SAME IN BOTH CASES. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MEET EITHER REQUIREMENT. JUDGE: PATRICK J.
